claim_boundary: Minimal technical causal-pair calibration lifecycle recovery only; no model-quality, binding, Kd, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, Top7500, or production-promotion claim.

failure_source.diagnosis: V1.2 independently recomputed floating calibration observations per arm, producing byte-distinct receipts despite identical selected lambda and conflict verdict.
failure_source.frozen_pair_gate_to_preserve: C0 calibration SHA256 must equal C1 calibration SHA256 exactly

frozen_calibration_contract.lambda_selection: choose the smallest median shared-gradient ratio in [0.05,0.15], otherwise closest to 0.10

new: one shared calibration materialization per fold before either arm optimizer
both arms hash-validate and byte-replay the same fold artifact
both arms are forbidden from recalibrating

required_fail_closed_checks: expected SHA256 before and after arm run
initial model-state hash and shared-parameter order
exactly one materializer invocation per fold
